reason: The remediation only modifies the pam_pwquality configuration to set a minimum password length. This is a standard authentication hardening change that does not affect system boot, networking, or filesystem layout and does not risk immediate lockout because existing passwords remain valid; only new passwords must meet the length requirement.
estimated_impact: authentication/authorization affected; Users may encounter password change failures if they attempt to set passwords shorter than the new minimum; Potential for mis‑typed configuration syntax causing pam_pwquality to fail loading
